pi_items.source: task.json metadata field, task description (line 5), and verified against export_result.sh filter search logic (line 60 checks if 'urgent actions' in name.lower())
Verified in export_result.sh line 54 and verifier.py line 53 which search for filters on model_id = 'quality.alert'

Verified in setup_task.sh lines 48-50 which searches for stages with 'new' in lowercase name. Also consistent with Odoo 17 Quality module documentation which lists 'New' as a standard stage for quality alerts

Verified in setup_task.sh line 73 which sets priority='1' for high/starred alerts. Confirmed by verifier.py lines 74-76 which accepts priority = '1' as valid. Per Odoo 17 documentation, priority 0=unstarred/normal, priority 1+=starred (at least 1 star = high priority)

privileged_info_summary: This task requires agents to create a custom filter in Odoo 17 Quality module on the quality.alert model. The filter must be named 'Urgent Actions' and use a domain combining two conditions: priority='1' (or >0 or !=0) AND stage_id matching the 'New' stage. The filter searches for alerts marked as high priority (at least 1 star) in the new/open stage. All test data is synthetic, created during task setup using XML-RPC API calls to generate quality alerts with priority 0 (normal) and 1 (high) in new and done stages. The verifier checks for filter existence, domain logic correctness, and proper stage/priority filtering by reading from the Odoo database via XML-RPC.
